creator: fullermd@mortis.futuresouth.com
text:
In http://www.freebsd.org/tutorials/ddwg/ddwg43.html, and the reference to it at http://www.freebsd.org/tutorials/ddwg/ddwg40.html, it refers to /usr/src/sys/i386/i386/conf.c, which doesn't exist.  If I read the source aright, this should be autoconf.c.

Fix: 

Correct the reference on the web site.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Go to www.freebsd.org, read through the Device Driver Writer's Tutorial.
